info.longName: Innovator International Developed Power Buffer ETF - November

funds_data.description: The fund invests at least 80% of its net assets in FLexible EXchange® Options that reference the iShares MSCI EAFE ETF. FLEX Options are exchange-traded option contracts with uniquely customizable terms. It's strategy has been specifically designed to produce the outcomes based upon the performance of the underlying ETF’s share price over the duration of the outcome period. The fund is non-diversified.
